  %constant.24 = s32[] constant(50400)

  %jit__where_.1 = s32[4,128]{1,0} call(%lt.3, %add.3, %Arg_1.3), to_apply=%_where.1, metadata={op_name="jit(_where)"}
  %broadcast_in_dim.8 = s32[4,128,1]{2,1,0} reshape(%jit__where_.1), metadata={op_name="broadcast_in_dim"}

  %constant.22 = s32[] constant(50399)

  %le.3 = pred[4,128,1]{2,1,0} compare(%broadcast_in_dim.8, %le.2), direction=LE, metadata={op_name="le"}
  %and.1 = pred[4,128,1]{2,1,0} and(%ge.3, %le.3), metadata={op_name="and"}
  %constant.25 = pred[] constant(true)
  %reduce_and.7 = pred[4,128]{1,0} reduce(%and.1, %constant.25), dimensions={2}, to_apply=%region_0.2, metadata={op_name="reduce_and"}
  %broadcast_in_dim.9 = pred[4,128,4096]{2,1,0} broadcast(%reduce_and.7), dimensions={0,1}, metadata={op_name="broadcast_in_dim"}
